Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.description: A bacterial infection causing dark, water-soaked spots on leaves and fruit.

Pepper__bell___healthy.description: The plant shows no visible signs of disease.
treatment: Monitor for early signs of pests

Potato___Early_blight.description: A fungal disease causing brown concentric-ring lesions on older leaves.

Potato___Late_blight.description: A severe disease causing dark, rapidly spreading lesions on leaves and tubers.
treatment: Avoid planting potatoes in the same soil next season

Potato___healthy.description: The plant shows no visible disease symptoms.

Tomato_Bacterial_spot.description: A bacterial disease forming small dark spots on leaves and fruit.

Tomato_Early_blight.description: A fungal disease causing brown concentric-ring lesions on lower leaves.

Tomato_Late_blight.description: A destructive disease causing dark, water-soaked lesions and rapid plant decline.

Tomato_Leaf_Mold.description: A fungal disease producing yellow patches and olive-green mold on leaves.

Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot.description: A fungal disease forming many small circular spots with dark borders.

Tomato_Spider_mites_Two_spotted_spider_m.description: A pest infestation causing yellow speckles, webbing, and leaf bronzing.
treatment: Spray leaves with water to remove mites
Use insecticidal soap or neem oil

Tomato__Target_Spot.description: A fungal disease producing large brown lesions with concentric rings.

Tomato__Tomato_YellowLeaf__Curl_Virus.description: A viral disease spread by whiteflies, causing curled leaves and stunted growth.
treatment: Control whiteflies with neem oil or insecticidal soap

Tomato__Tomato_mosaic_virus.description: A viral infection causing mottled leaves and distorted growth.
treatment: Avoid handling tobacco before touching plants

Tomato_healthy.description: The plant shows no signs of disease or pest damage.
treatment: Monitor for early signs of disease
